name: schema-generator
description: Infer a unified schema from JSONL and JSON records.

scripts.smoke:ts: pnpm run build && node dist/cli.js --input fixtures/sample.jsonl --type-name SampleRecord --format typescript
scripts.smoke:zod: pnpm run build && node dist/cli.js --input fixtures/sample.jsonl --type-name SampleRecord --format zod
scripts.smoke:json-schema: pnpm run build && node dist/cli.js --input fixtures/sample.jsonl --type-name SampleRecord --format json-schema
scripts.smoke:diagnostics: pnpm run build && node dist/cli.js --input fixtures/sample.jsonl --type-name SampleRecord --diagnostics
scripts.smoke:multi-input: pnpm run build && node dist/cli.js --input fixtures/sample.jsonl --input fixtures/sample-array.json --input fixtures/sample-object.json --input-format auto --type-name MixedRecord --format typescript --diagnostics
scripts.smoke:glob: pnpm run build && node dist/cli.js --input "fixtures/sample*.json*" --input-format auto --type-name MixedRecord --format json-schema
scripts.smoke:phase3: pnpm run build && node dist/cli.js --input fixtures/phase3.jsonl --type-name EventRecord --format zod --required-threshold 0.9 --enum-threshold 0.4 --min-enum-count 3 --record-min-keys 5 --record-max-presence 0.5 --diagnostics
scripts.smoke: pnpm run smoke:ts && pnpm run smoke:zod && pnpm run smoke:json-schema && pnpm run smoke:diagnostics && pnpm run smoke:multi-input && pnpm run smoke:glob && pnpm run smoke:phase3
